title: ヒシアマ姐さんの責任！

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta hurry before lunch ends! Where in the
world is that rascal?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Man, how could I have forgotten to give this
lunch to my dorm resident!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
She must be hungry... She's always so excited to
get the lunches I pack for her too...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Damn, this is no time to just stand around! I gotta
get this to her, quick!

Hishi Amazon exhausts herself after scouring the
entire academy in order to deliver lunch to the
right person.
